author: gb9t
content: Iteration 25: intel/igc.md committed (7a10ff8, 195 lines). Intel I225/I226 Foxville 2.5G — every modern motherboard with 2.5G LAN + entry-level open-source TSN NIC (industrial, automotive AVB). ~16K LOC. Headline: TSN (TAS + CBS + LaunchTime) + strong PHC (sub-100ns). Rust translation: typed TSN qopt (Tas/Cbs structs), LaunchTime as typed TX descriptor. Grsec: smaller attack surface but unique TSN+PTP defenses — TSN qopt silicon-cap validated (closes 'garbage TAS hangs FW' class), LaunchTime range bounded (closes 'distant-future TX queue saturation' DoS), PHC CAP_SYS_TIME (closes time-sync disruption), PHY register write allowlist (closes hostile-PHY brick), LED CAP_SYS_ADMIN (closes covert-channel-via-motherboard-LEDs class). 25 docs / ~1.57M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/net/ethernet/intel/igb — Intel I210/I211/I350 1G NIC (still ships in enterprise IPMI/BMC interfaces, embedded controllers).
